cards.name: Deep Sea Fisherman
cards.abilityDescription: Each turn: 25% chance to throw bait, silencing the current enemy for 1 turn. Targets the enemy behind the front card.

cards.name: Moonlit Lizard
cards.abilityDescription: Dodges the first incoming attack. Each subsequent hit (pre-damage): 25% gain 25% DR for 2 turns; 25% permanently reduce enemy ATK by 15%. Each attack: 25% gain +20% ATK permanently; 25% hit two enemies for 55% ATK.

cards.name: Chimera
cards.abilityDescription: On entry, enter a random mode. Randomize mode after every 2 turns.

cards.name: Abyssal Nightmare
cards.abilityDescription: Attacks twice — second hit deals 55% ATK. On kill: gain a 1-hit shield and +15% DR permanently (stacks per kill).

cards.name: Earth Beast
cards.abilityDescription: Gain 25% damage reduction at battle start. Heal 10% max HP per turn and gain 3% ATK each turn.

cards.name: Grave Guardian
cards.abilityDescription: Upon death: transfers 20% of this card's MAX stats to the next card in line

cards.name: Solar Beast
cards.abilityDescription: Deals 50% bonus damage when enemy is below 40% HP

cards.name: Leviathan King
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: sacrifices 20% of own HP and permanently adds that amount as bonus ATK

cards.name: Jester
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: permanently copies the active enemy card's ability

cards.name: Athena Apostle
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: gain a 1-hit shield and always attacks first. Defeating 2 enemies grants another shield. While shielded, deals 25% more damage.

cards.name: Aeternus the Abyssal King
cards.abilityDescription: Every 2 attacks, deal 25% ATK damage to all enemies. Killing an enemy grants a 1-hit shield.

cards.name: Bandit Scout
cards.abilityDescription: First attack in the entire battle deals 3x damage

cards.name: Bandit Archer
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack also splashes 30% of ATK to the next enemy in line

cards.name: Bandit Leader
cards.abilityDescription: Heals for 20% of damage dealt and permanently cuts the same amount off the enemy's MAX HP

cards.name: Orc Warrior
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: boosts all allies' ATK by 20% for the rest of the battle

cards.name: Orc Archer
cards.abilityDescription: Every 2nd attack deals double damage

cards.name: Orc Shaman
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack: reduces enemy ATK by 5% permanently and poisons them (3% MAX HP per turn for 4 turns). On death: gives the next ally a shield equal to 50% of this card's MAX HP

cards.name: Orc King
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: reduces enemy ATK by 20% permanently (all enemy cards)

cards.name: Bat
cards.abilityDescription: Revives once at 1 HP with permanent +60% ATK. 35% chance to immediately attack the current enemy on revive

cards.name: Vampire
cards.abilityDescription: Heals for 40% of damage dealt
